   • Initial flight options on Budget Airlines (Economy Class) typically range between €50 and €150 per person, which could be quite competitive for your dates in Summer 2024.

2. Dublin, Ireland:  
   • Dublin is very welcoming for families with a variety of parks, interactive museums, and lively cultural events.  
   • You might consider flights via Standard Airlines (Economy Class) with prices generally in the neighborhood of €100 to €300 per person.

3. Barcelona, Spain:
